entry.title: Re: Configuration for secure act 2.0 section 109 roll ove...
entry.content: Thank you for the information Sara.. I'm using the WRNG_CALC and letting it calc the pre-tax and then I wrote payroll rules with validation checks on Age and Over the 145,000 limit and then move it to our Post-tax wage type and remove the pre-tax calculated one. So far in test this has working great for all our testing employee scenarios. So if SAP doesn't deliver an appectable solution we plan on using mine that I bulit a few months ago when SAP said they were not going to provide a solution. Thank you, Joe .

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 BY-PRODUCT
entry.content:
Hi @mari_outtaleb96 ,

If you then need to deduct the By-Product cost from the Product, this is exactly SAP's behaviour. Follow what is described in their documentation, and you should have no problems. I did not.

Common Cases in Production Costing | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Story Report: Objective management
entry.content:
Hi,

I created the story report to get the Objective related data; I have enabled the permission: Data Access: Story for Objective management, do I need to enable Objective plan permission as well?

Br!

entry.title: Multiaction to import data into analytic data models in SAC in a sequence
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a multiaction in SAC that carries out data imports to data models (analytic). For instance, if I have 3 data models, then step 1 of the multiaction should do data refresh for model A, step 2 of the multiaction should do data refresh for model B and so on. There is a step in the multiaction feature called 'Data Import Step' that can be used to execute a data import job. Please see the screenshot.

On scheduling this multiaction in the calendar of SAC, though the schedule does its job i.e., carry out import jobs in a sequence, when there is a failure of a particular step (or import job), the rest of the jobs/steps are not executed. A step is dependent on the previous step for its execution. Is there a way to overcome this limitation and have the multiaction task run the steps independently?. 

Please let me know.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Handling Field Length Differences in SAP Ariba – SAP ERP including S/4 HANA Integration Using CI
entry.content: You've nailed a challenge that resonates with many. Good one Dev 👍

entry.title: Customers failing to interface with the newly created Industry key
entry.content:
We are on ECC 6.0 

 

We had a requirement to configure a new Industry and Industry Key with the following values:

 

  • G29 – Corporate – Telecom
  • G30 – Corporate – Health

 

After setting up these new configurations, we observed that customers created for ZSLD are failing to interface into SAP. The IDocs are being generated with status 51, and the error message displayed is:

 

"Business partner A-******** not found, correct your entry."

 

However, despite the error, we can confirm that the customer is successfully created and visible in SAP.

entry.title: Re: Change document for user is not updating
entry.content: i also face same issue, but my case i'm using BAPI_USER_CHANGE in RFC connection, the change documents are not updated only for few users but remaining users are updated properly

entry.title: Re: Time type group container/collector - Cross year cumulating counting overtime hours
entry.content:
I created an Improvement Request to solve this issue: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/351707/?section=sectionDetails

I think it's quite technical, hopefully companies understand the impact of it to their own SF Time Tracking solution. In the beginning it's not so obvious, because in the first year it seems to work correct. But like you describe, the new year is the problem. Any support is highly appreciated.

entry.title: How to print HU label in Work Centre packing for IBD in public cloud
entry.content:
How to print HU label in Work Centre packing for IBD in public cloud?

Do we have option to print the HU label through work center screen in SAP public cloud?

If yes, at what stage its available and how we can do it?

entry.title: Export a list of the favorites SAP Notes and KBAs
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Can I export a list of favorites SAP Notes and KBAs from expired S-users?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ADSO's and Composite Providers are not visible in Ana...
entry.content: You need to disable DisableBWDirectSearch in the Technical Configuration of AFO. Restart AFO and you should find everything.

entry.title: Re: Export a list of the favorites SAP Notes and KBAs
entry.content:
Hello,

It is not possible to export a list of favorites SAP Notes for users whose accounts have expired.
Once an account has expired it is not possible to access the information related to the users, including saved favorites, is typically restricted in accordance with SAP's data privacy policies.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content:
Unfortunately the Recording Dictionary and its texts are used only during the initial recording session. There's no simple way to apply a new Recording Dictionary to an existing Simulation, except maybe through Rerecording, which is more of a hassle then just recording a new simulation.

I would have your author select the correct Recording Dictionary as the default in their Producer, then record a new simulation with the correct texts. Or, manually update the Demo and Practice text for each incorrectly-recorded Step. Or, use the Edit > Search & Replace Bubble Content function in the Simulation Editor. That can be tricky and can have unintended results. 

Having the author correct their own mistakes helps them remember to do it correctly the next time. 

Shane/Anton/smart people, please correct/clarify as needed.

entry.title: Re: Asset accounting early payment discount
entry.content:
Hi @Danny5 ,

Couple of steps you need to follow:-

1. Transaction type config - Go to t-code AO73 - define transaction type for asset osting. For the relevant transaction type (in this case 100 for external acquisition), ensure 'Net acquisition' is activated.
2. Go to t-code Obb8 - for payment term config - ensure payment term is set to allow discounts and is net-based (not gross).
3. Go to FBKP - go to your asset dcoument type - double click - go to control data and activate tick mark - 'Net document type'

This how your to-be entry should be

Acquistion

Dr Asset 1000
Cr Vendor 1000

Payment

Dr Vendor 1000
Cr Bank 970
Cr Asset 30 (discount reduces APC — acquisition value)

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: Configuration of special periods in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Scott,

we created Special Periods exactly as described in your description and in the video.

However, the Special Periods are still displayed in the old hierarchy in the story, even if you add a "_SP" to the Fiscal Year attribute in the Date dimension. It wouldn't make any technical sense for it to work just because of that. Therefore, I assumed that a filter was somehow set in the video, e.g., in the table. So I filtered by year and then changed the hierarchy as shown in the video. It works. But if I change the hierarchy back to the old one, the Special Periods are also displayed because the filter has disappeared from the table.

Is there a way to prevent this?

 

Thanks and best regards

Goran

entry.title: Re: App UI5 in workzone show loading screen never end
entry.content: I have the same problem, I checked the logs of the cloud connector and didn't find anything conclusive, did you manage to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Customers failing to interface with the newly created...
entry.content:
Hi @GuruDath ,

Are you using ZSLD in any of the custom process, any functional module or badi , or any other vlaidation susbstitution which is triggering while system tries to read the value G29/G30. I would ask you to debugg and verify because chances are it may fail while reading the data due to custom logic.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: Configuration of special periods in SAC
entry.content:
We also noticed a bug during testing.

If you switch to User-Managed within the Date dimension and then add entries from the previous year using Generate Additional Member, the range doesn't seem to be updated in the background. I couldn't load data for the newly added year into the data model via an Excel upload. Strangely, it works for future years. I then created a new data model for testing and first extended the range to the previous year before switching to User-Managed. This made the upload of the previous year's data work.

Does this mean that it's no longer possible to change the range to previous years once the Date dimension has been changed to User-Managed? That would be very user-unfriendly.

 

Best regards

Goran

entry.title: Re: Multiaction to import data into analytic data models...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is by design as you also pointed out.  Please see below:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/69a370e6cfd84315973101389baacde0.html

In some cases, one of the multi action steps may not run successfully. Changes from the previous steps will still take effect, but the multi action won’t proceed to the following steps.

I don't think there is any setting like "continue on error" etc. Can't think of any standard workaround either other than breaking down the steps into different data actions/ multi actions which needs to run independently. Apparently this will break the sequential order unless you observe the start / finish times and schedule them accordingly.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Duplicated Windows in ALT+TAB
entry.content:
Hi @bastik @jsarciniegasg @Attila_Karpati @Peach14 ,

 

Did you all recently moved to Windows 11? That might be causing issue. I would suggest to swtich off snap layout tab feature.
Simply go to settings---system---multitasking. Under alt+tab, set the option to 'open  windows only' or 'don't show tabs'
This stops windows from grouping snapped layout or browser tabs as separate alt+tab entries.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: document management system
entry.content: How do i create a document management system for images

entry.title: Re: Managing Event Volume: Summary Events and Grouping Events in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Rashmi,

Thank you for the blog, could you please explain the confirm option in actions menu for the alerts.What is the meaning and scope of confirm?


1. The events captured and alerted to recipeints via an email notification in last calculation, would not be considered for next calculation, until some one clicks confirm?

2. For every alert generated, an incident would be created, if create ticket option is enabled? e.g. in the example given by you, two incidents would be generated, first inc for 4 messages and second Inc for 8 messages, as per the groups created?

3. How can we automate the process of retrying the failed messages in Cloud ALM?

Thanks,

Indu Khurana.

entry.title: Re: Mobile Start-Push Notification
entry.content:
Hi @Thomas, thanks, what user identifier attributes that should match on S4 and IAS for Work zone? We have a setup where notifications are correctly pushed to Work zone from S4/H but Push notification on mobiles not working. The SMP logs on Work zone says that notification were requested but users not registered for push notification. Although we could see them registered and even sent them test messages successfully.

Thanks

MK

entry.title: Re: DUPLICATE VENDORS IN PROPOSAL WITH SEPARATE INVOICES
entry.content:
Hi @Nish0301 ,

Check your vendor master set-up. It might have "individual payment" tick/check box option activated. If that dosen;t solve your problem, then check the payment log in F110, it will clearly state the actual reason - e.g. 'Payment cannot be grouped with other items due to differing house bank' or 'Separate payment created due to payment method difference' whatever is the issue it will highlight.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: How to connect to SQL Anywhere database (v17.0.11.790...
entry.content:
The MIN_TLS_VERSION controls the minimum TLS version permitted but the server and client will negotiate the highest version that both support.   The default should permit either 1.3 or 1.2 TLS - older TLS versions would need to be added.

You can set this option on the server and/or the client.  For the client, it is a network protocol option.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Country Activation in CBC
entry.content:
Hi @ob_mike ,

Yes, CBC allows that.

1. You choose up to 5 countries per activation batch for performance reasons. After completing those 5, you click 'complete activity', and then you can immediately re-enter the activity to choose more countries and repeat — all before reaching finance/org structure steps .

2. After all desired countries are activated, you proceed to other settings one by one such as - fiscal year variant, group currency, etc.

I hope this answer your question.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Transfer pricing determination in SAP BRIM Convergent Invoicing ICO asynchronous settlement process
entry.content:
Dear all,
Can anyone please help me with the transfer pricing determination process in the intercompany asynchronous settlement scenario?

The requirement is that the supplying entity maintains their list prices in the pricing master. How can we bring the same pricing details to the requesting entity, so that they can use those values to charge their customers accordingly?

As the requesting entities do not have authorization to view the price details of the supplying entity, we need a way to make this pricing information available securely.

entry.title: Re: Tax details are deleted automatically in BP identific...
entry.content:
Hi @NaveenkumarKJ1 ,

I can answer this confidently as we recently faced this issue in one of our project. The data gets deleted or sometimes get overwritten due to synchronization issue between BP and Vendor master data.

There is note will resolve this issue.

Note - 2290429

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2290429

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: LOG OF CHANGES TO USERS IN SAP S4HANA
entry.content: Thank you very much for your help @RaymondGiuseppi . I used the table you indicate, USH02 - Change history for logon data. Here are the fields End validity and User lock, just the ones I need. Slds

entry.title: Re: API interfaces for the reversal of production goods r...
entry.content:
Hi @xihongshi ,

Yes, you need to reverse the original goods receipt or material issue and then create a new correct one.


Use the standard Material Document reversal APIs

OData API: API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT – supports canceling document items-reversal of GR or GI
SOAP API: MaterialDocumentCreateRequest_Async_In – flag a reversal via DELIVERY_DOCUMENTREACTION or reversal indicators.

These APIs allow you to send a request with the document number and a reversal indicator. Afterwards, use the same above APIs to post a new goods issue or goods geceipt, with corrected data such as quantities, batch, movement type, etc.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Issue: SAC story is not visible in SAP Build Workzone - - Content Security Policy Issue on Trial Acc
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m using an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) trial account and have created a story that I want to embed in SAP Work Zone.

However, when I click on the Work Zone tile, the SAC tenant refuses to connect. In the browser console, I see the following error:

Error: *"Refused to frame '<SAC Tenant URL>' because an ancestor violates the following Content Security Policy directive: "frame-ancestors "."

SAP documentation suggests the following resolution:

Go to: Main Menu > System > Administration > App Integration,
and add your origin under the Trusted Origins section.

But the issue is — this App Integration section doesn’t appear to be available in the SAC trial account.

Has anyone faced this issue before? Is there a workaround or any way to allow embedding from a trial SAC account?

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Talent Pool Nomination RBP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking to create a global Talent Pool that allows multiple managers to submit their nominations. My question is: can I restrict managers from seeing each other’s nominations, allowing them to view only their own?

Additionally, is it possible to configure RBP so that the HR team managing this Talent Pool can access a consolidated view of all nominations?

Thank you!

entry.content:
Cuando descargo información del infotipo 372 de una fecha determinada hay registros que no aparecen en lo que descargo, a pesar de que si aparecen en sistema.
Hay alguna transacción o variante que se pueda utilizar?

entry.title: Re: DFKKZP-KLAEB updated with value ************ and DFKKZP-OPBEL updated with value *
entry.content:
Hi Amla, 
I am also facing the similar issue, but it is fine that is updating with '*" but when we post that payment to account and want to reverse the document from FICA it is allowing to reverse but keep the payment lot in In-Processing status. 
Any Solution how can we reverse the payment where it should not open the payment lot. 

 

Thanks
Ankit Mishra

entry.title: Re: API interface for reversing goods receipt
entry.content:
Hi @xihongshi ,

Yes in SAP S/4HANA cloud, when you reverse a goods receipt system does create a new material document with movement type 102. Use 'Manage material document' app to reverse manually. Simply select GR document and click cancel/reverse to post reversal with movement type 102.
For API, use standard OData A2X API -  (api name - API_GOODSMVT_2).

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: Question for reduction of O inventory when Outsourcin...
entry.content:
Hello @xihongshi 

Thank you for your question regarding the reduction of "O" inventory during outsourcing procurement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 O Inventory Reduction:

The reduction of "O" inventory (i.e., components provided to the supplier) is automatically triggered during Goods Receipt (GR) for the subcontracting purchase order. When the finished goods are received:

  • The system posts the finished goods with movement type 101
  • It simultaneously consumes the components from vendor stock with movement type 543

This is part of the standard subcontracting process delivered under scope item 3B2 – External Processing.

API Support

This process can also be executed via API:

  • API: API_GOODSMOVEMENT_SRV (Post Goods Movement)
  • When using movement type 101 for a subcontracting PO, the system will automatically post component consumption (543) based on the linked BOM.

Check SAP API Hub – Goods Movement API

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES and Android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO - Error in Play Sto
entry.content: I am running into this same problem. My app doesn't use these functions and has no reason to request them, but I cannot figure out where to turn them off. It used to be part of the deploy/build process, but that tap was removed in an update I think.

entry.title: From Shock To Strategy: Rethinking Supply Chains For The Next 30 Years
entry.content:
If the last few years have taught us anything, it’s that uncertainty is the new normal. Supply chain leaders have navigated a relentless series of shocks—geopolitical upheaval, climate extremes, and rapid technological change. In the World Economic Forum’s latest white paper, “From Shock to Strategy: Building Value Chains for the Next 30 Years,” the message is clear:

"The era of linear, globalized value chains is over. The future belongs to those who can build resilience, agility, and sustainability into the very DNA of their operations."

 

Why Supply Chains Must Change

Let’s start with the big picture. The WEF’s Global Future Council on Advanced Manufacturing and Value Chains has mapped out a future where “the only certainty is uncertainty”.

Gone are the days when manufacturers could rely on a predictable, globalized model. Today, 90% of industry leaders are shifting toward regionalization and dual sourcing strategies. Headlines about trade wars, cyberattacks, and climate disasters aren’t just background noise, they’re the new operating environment.

The Council’s white paper frames the conversation around three time horizons—2030, 2040, and 2050—each with its own challenges and opportunities.

The goal? To help companies move from reactive shock management to proactive, strategic value chain design.

 

Eight Forces Shaping the Future

At the heart of the report there are eight powerful forces that will shape supply chains through 2050:

  1. Global Relations and Trade: Regionalization is replacing globalization as companies hedge against geopolitical risk and trade policy volatility.
  2. Regulatory Complexity: The patchwork of global regulations is growing more tangled, demanding agile governance and compliance models.
  3. Consumer Expectations: Today’s consumers want more—faster delivery, sustainable products, and transparency at every step.
  4. Climate Disruption: Extreme weather and environmental regulations are putting pressure on logistics and manufacturing alike.
  5. Technology Evolution: The pace of innovation is relentless, but so is the fragmentation between regions and sectors.
  6. Cybersecurity: As supply chains digitize, the risk of cyberattacks grows—especially for those without robust defenses.
  7. Workforce and Skills: The talent gap is widening as new technologies outpace workforce training and reskilling.
  8. Social Equity: Value chains must address not just efficiency, but fairness and inclusiveness across regions and communities.

 

Three Pillars for Future-Ready Value Chains

So, what does it take to build a value chain that can thrive amid all this change?

The WEF report highlights three strategic pillars:

  • Integrated Sustainability: Sustainability isn’t a side project—it’s a core business requirement. Companies are embedding environmental and social goals into every link of the value chain, from sourcing to delivery.
  • End-to-End Collaboration: Siloed operations are a thing of the past. The leaders of tomorrow are building deep partnerships and transparency with suppliers, customers, and even competitors to collaborate, share risks and innovate together.
  • Technology Adoption: Digital transformation is the backbone of resilience. Automation, AI, and real-time analytics are enabling companies to anticipate disruptions, optimize operations, and deliver on customer expectations.

 

What Does the Roadmap Look Like?

2030: Action Today for Tomorrow’s Resilience

The near-term focus is on tangible, actionable steps. The report highlights real-world use cases where companies are already making progress—whether it’s implementing circular economy models, building regional supply hubs, or using digital twins for scenario planning.

The message is simple: start now and build a foundation for the future.

2040: Scenario Planning for the Unknown

Looking ahead to 2040, the WEF uses scenario planning to explore how these eight forces might interact. Will regulatory complexity spur innovation or stifle it? Will technology create new divides or bridge old ones? These scenarios aren’t predictions—they’re tools for stress-testing strategies and building agility into long-term plans.

2050: A Vision for Sustainable, Equitable Value Chains

The 2050 outlook is a call to action. It challenges leaders to think beyond incremental improvement and envision a world where value chains are not only resilient and sustainable, but also inclusive and equitable. Achieving this vision will require bold decisions, cross-sector collaboration, and a willingness to rethink old assumptions.

Key Takeaways for Supply Chain Leaders

  • Resilience is Non-Negotiable: The next disruption is always around the corner. Build flexibility and redundancy into your operations.
  • Sustainability Drives Competitiveness: Regulatory and consumer pressures will only increase. Make sustainability a source of innovation and differentiation.
  • Collaboration is the New Competitive Edge: No company can go it alone. Forge partnerships across your ecosystem.
  • Invest in People and Technology: The future belongs to those who can harness technology and empower their workforce to adapt.

As someone who’s spent decades in supply chain and manufacturing, I see the WEF’s “From Shock to Strategy” report as both a wake-up call and a roadmap. The next 30 years will be defined by those who can turn uncertainty into opportunity. The time to act is now—because the supply chains we build today will shape the world of tomorrow.

entry.title: Re: Time off Story report data access for manager - Targe...
entry.content:
Hi Shipra,
I'm having the same problem, expecting an especific group, to who I shared a story Report, could see their respective target population data. But in the opposite, they see the whole the data obtained in the query. 
Even, I tried to get the data of employee time through the Job Information joining tables. But is the same behavior.

I didn't find any information about the RBP how to work with schemas in Story Reports.
This didn't work with Employee Time Object : https://me.sap.com/notes/3475150/E

Best Regards

Ramiro

entry.title: Re: Transitioning from SAP Design Studio to Advanced Reporting Solutions
entry.content:
@AngelaDai 

I do not have access to the videos due to the authentication. It seems that my user needs to be registered under the SAP SE tenant of Microsoft. Are there any alternative links?

entry.title: Sftp for Product Data
entry.content:
Hi,

Does Emarsys provide sftp to load product data (for webextend)? Or should we use our own sftp for that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sftp for Product Data
entry.content:
Hello,

Usually the Emarsys customers use their own SFTP server for this purpose, but there are Emarsys customers who use the Smart Insight SFTP to store the product data file and then build the URL to be used as the product catalog URL based on the SFTP URL standard. An SFTP URL with user and password authentication typically follows the format sftp://[username[:password]@]host[:port][/path]. For example, sftp://user:password@example.com:/path/to/files would connect to the server example.com as user user with password password and navigate to the directory /path/to/files. This URL would then be adapted based on the Smart Insight SFTP URL and user/password that you have in place.

This is the only way that you could use a Emarsys-hosted SFTP server for this purpose. Hopefully this answer can be useful to your business requirements.

entry.title: Uploading Custom Flow Functions to Marketplace in SAP BUILD
entry.content:
I recently built several custom flow functions in one of my apps.  I would like to use these in my other apps without having to build it each time.  The only way I can think of to do that, would be to upload the new function to the marketplace.  Is there a way to do this?  I would love to make it available to other users as they are functions that would be great for everyone to have (one is a Switch that takes a single input and evaluate the condition to determine which of 11 outputs to trigger, instead of having to program 10 If Conditions each time.  The second one is similar, but it can trigger multiple outputs).

If there is no way for me to upload it, is there a way to request an addition to the marketplace?  I can provide all the info about how I built mine.

Single-Switch Flow and OutputsSingle-SwitchMulti-Switch

Grato

entry.title: Re: Handler for Button not called in adaptation
entry.content:
I think your namespace in the button is wrong, you're missing MainCntrlExt

Try:

.extension.customer.create.notif.variant.MainCntrlExt.onLorCapPress

entry.title: Re: Handler for Button not called in adaptation
entry.content: Oh, I'm on mobile and did not see the answer, good to know I got the right answer 😄

entry.title: Re: Handler for Button not called in adaptation

entry.title: Libere todo el potencial de sus soluciones de SAP Fieldglass: un webinar que no se puede perder!
entry.content:
¿Alguna vez se ha preguntado cómo optimizar la gestión y visibilidad de su fuerza laboral en un mundo en constante cambio? Esta pregunta no es solo una curiosidad, sino una necesidad urgente. Frente a la creciente demanda de soluciones flexibles para la fuerza laboral, SAP Fieldglass se ha consolidado como líder en la redefinición de la gestión del talento externo. Pero, ¿cómo puede asegurarse de que está aprovechando al máximo todo el potencial de sus soluciones SAP Fieldglass?

Le invitamos a nuestro próximo webinar:
“Maximizando el Valor Total de su Solución SAP Fieldglass: Alcanzando la Obtención de Valor”, una sesión diseñada para profesionales de todos los niveles de experiencia con SAP Fieldglass. Tanto si está iniciando su recorrido con esta poderosa herramienta, como si desea perfeccionar y optimizar su configuración actual, este webinar le brindará valiosos conocimientos y estrategias prácticas.

¿Por qué debe asistir?

Este no es un webinar cualquiera. Es una experiencia interactiva enfocada en entregar valor tangible para su organización. Estas son las razones para reservar la fecha:

  • Orientación experta: Aprenda de especialistas que han implementado SAP Fieldglass con éxito en múltiples industrias. Descubra consejos exclusivos y estrategias comprobadas para aumentar la eficiencia y reducir costos.

  • Valor revelado: Analizaremos en profundidad el valor que SAP Fieldglass puede aportar — un componente clave para cualquier organización que quiera medir y mejorar el retorno de sus inversiones tecnológicas.

  • Establecimiento de objetivos y medición: Conozca cómo definir metas claras y alcanzables con SAP Fieldglass, así como métodos efectivos para medir el valor generado. Esto permitirá a su equipo crear benchmarks y KPIs que impulsen el éxito y el ROI.

  • Transformación en la gestión laboral: Explore formas innovadoras de evolucionar de modelos tradicionales hacia enfoques ágiles y dinámicos, preparados para los desafíos del futuro. Aprenda a no solo gestionar, sino a transformar su fuerza laboral con SAP Fieldglass.

Agenda del webinar

  • Introducción a SAP Fieldglass y sus beneficios

  • Exploración del valor integral de SAP Fieldglass

  • Estrategias para establecer objetivos alineados con las soluciones Fieldglass

  • Medición del ROI: herramientas y métricas clave

  • Casos de éxito recientes

  • Sesión interactiva de preguntas y respuestas con expertos

¿Quién debería participar?

Este webinar está especialmente dirigido a profesionales responsables de la gestión de la fuerza laboral, gerentes de compras, líderes de Recursos Humanos, especialistas en TI, y en general a cualquier persona involucrada en la gestión del talento o la colaboración con proveedores, comprometida en maximizar las capacidades organizacionales con SAP Fieldglass.

Inscripción y detalles

Reserve su lugar para este evento imprescindible y comience su camino hacia la optimización con SAP Fieldglass. Inscríbase a través de los webcasts de adopción del ISBN.

🗓 Fecha: 24 de julio de 2025
🕛 Hora: 12:00 (Hora de Argentina)

Maximizar todo el valor de su solución SAP Fieldglass: Lograr la obtención de valor - Webinar 

No se preocupe si no puede asistir en vivo, el webinar será grabado y estará disponible bajo demanda poco después del evento.

Para finalizar...

En un entorno donde la eficiencia y la gestión estratégica pueden definir el éxito o el fracaso, comprender y maximizar herramientas como SAP Fieldglass es fundamental. Este webinar es más que una experiencia educativa; es una inversión en el futuro de su organización.

No pierda esta oportunidad. Potencie su ventaja competitiva y transforme su gestión de fuerza laboral participando con nosotros. Será tiempo bien invertido. ¡Lo esperamos!

entry.title: Re: How to Pack & Repack HU EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @imel_99 

Thanks for your question.

Repacking a handling unit via the “Pack Handling Units – Advanced” app updates the HU structure but does not update Available Stock until all related warehouse tasks (such as put away or repack) are confirmed.

Please check if HU 300001914 is involved in any open warehouse tasks using the Monitor Warehouse Tasks or Warehouse Order View. Once these are confirmed, the available stock will update accordingly.

SAP useful documentation References:

  • SAP Help: Handling Units in Extended Warehouse Management (EWM)
  • SAP Help: Pack Handling Units – Advanced App
  • Scope Item 3BS – Advanced Inbound Processing
  • Integrating Transportation and Warehouse Management -SAP Learning

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Libere todo o potencial das suas soluções SAP Fieldglass: um webinar que você não pode perder!
entry.content:
Já se perguntou como otimizar a gestão e ampliar a visibilidade da sua força de trabalho em um cenário de constantes transformações?
Essa não é apenas uma reflexão pertinente — é uma necessidade estratégica. Diante da crescente demanda por soluções flexíveis, o SAP Fieldglass se destaca como líder na transformação da gestão da força de trabalho. Mas será que sua organização está explorando todo o potencial da plataforma?

Temos o prazer de convidá-lo para o nosso próximo webinar:
Maximizando o Valor Total da Sua Solução SAP Fieldglass: Alcançando a Realização de Valor.
Essa sessão foi especialmente desenvolvida para profissionais em todos os estágios de adoção do SAP Fieldglass — desde iniciantes até usuários avançados que buscam aprimorar suas configurações e estratégias. Prepare-se para uma jornada de conhecimento prático e insights estratégicos.

Por que participar deste webinar?

Este não é mais um webinar genérico. É uma oportunidade interativa e orientada a resultados, desenhada para entregar valor real e aplicável à sua organização. Veja o que você pode esperar:

🔹Orientação de Especialistas
Aprenda com profissionais experientes que já implementaram o SAP Fieldglass com sucesso em diversos setores. Descubra dicas práticas, boas práticas e estratégias comprovadas para aumentar a eficiência e reduzir custos.

🔹Entendimento Profundo do Valor do Fieldglass
Vamos além da teoria e exploramos o que torna o SAP Fieldglass essencial para organizações que desejam mensurar e maximizar o retorno de suas soluções tecnológicas.

🔹Definição de Metas e Mensuração de Resultados
Saiba como definir objetivos claros com a ferramenta e aprenda métodos eficazes para medir o valor gerado — com foco em KPIs, benchmarks e indicadores de sucesso que apoiem o crescimento e o ROI.

🔹Transformação na Gestão da Força de Trabalho
Descubra como migrar de abordagens tradicionais para modelos mais ágeis, escaláveis e preparados para o futuro. A ideia não é apenas gerenciar — é transformar sua força de trabalho com inteligência.

Na agenda:

  • Introdução ao SAP Fieldglass e seus benefícios

  • Explorando o valor completo da solução

  • Estratégias eficazes de definição de metas

  • Mensuração de ROI: métricas, ferramentas e metodologias

  • Estudos de caso com histórias de sucesso reais

  • Sessão interativa de perguntas e respostas com especialistas SAP Fieldglass

Quem deve participar?

Este webinar é ideal para:

  • Profissionais de gestão de força de trabalho

  • Gestores de compras

  • Líderes de RH

  • Especialistas em TI

  • E todos que atuam com gestão de talentos, fornecedores ou processos de aquisição de serviços

Inscreva-se e participe!

Garanta sua vaga e embarque nessa jornada de otimização com o SAP Fieldglass.
🔗Inscreva-se agora nos [webcasts de adoção do ISBN]. 

Maximizando o valor de sua solução SAP Fieldglass: Alcançando a realização de valor - Webinar 

🗓️ Data: 24 de julho de 2025
🕛Horário: 10h (horário de Brasília)

Não poderá assistir ao vivo? Sem problemas — o conteúdo será gravado e estará disponível sob demanda após o evento.

Por que este webinar importa?

Em um mundo onde a agilidade, o controle e a eficiência definem o sucesso organizacional, dominar ferramentas como o SAP Fieldglass é um diferencial competitivo. Esta sessão vai além da teoria — ela é um investimento no futuro da sua organização.

Não perca! Eleve sua estratégia de gestão de força de trabalho a um novo patamar. Esperamos por você!

entry.content: Hi @M_jess1 - the error message I got is '1.5 time slot dates overlaps with 1.6 time slot'

entry.title: Problems when trying to stop a Replication Flow in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts, good day.

We're experiencing an unusual error, or at least something like this hasn't occurred in the few months we've been using DS on our project.

One of my colleagues wanted to stop one of the RFs so he could run a deployd with adjustment, but after stopping the view on the monitor, it hasn't changed from "Stopping" to "Stopped" for almost two hours.

When trying to force or stop it again, the following message appears

We can provide the following information to assist either you or an SAP engineer to solve the issue:

Correlation ID: fcfc656169facbe8ccd02eb3aabab21f
HTTP Status: 400 error
Error Code: ERROR_REPLICATION_FLOW_STOP_TRIGGERED_STOPPING
Technical Message: Stopping Replication flow is already in progress

So we don't know how we could stop it or what could be causing this error.

Could you help us?

Regards.
EBZ

entry.title: Re: We cannot settle the AUC values to GL account after u...
entry.content:
Hi @MaheshSaiBandaru ,

For case1 - This means your settlement profile doesn't permit settlement to cost center (KS)— due to this latest migration. Try to add explicitly KS as a valid receiver in the settlement profile.
Go to settlement profile for the AIAB sender asset, add receiver category KS to distribution rule, save and rerun AIAB.

For case2 - Settling prior-year AUC postings directly to GL is no longer supported if the asset innovation date differs from current year, this is a system constraint, not an error. Do workaround, first settle the old AUC to another AUC (within current year) and subsequently settle that current-year AUC to GL (or to the fixed asset)

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: How to avoid class/time slots overlapping error in a program?
entry.content:
Hi @MPB 

I don't remember seeing this error before, nor which setting / configuration might be interfering with the behavior... If no other colleague from the Community has further ideas, a ticket to the LMS support is needed.

Obrigado.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA EWM-QM Configuration Setup in 2020
entry.content:
Hi Sai Kiran,

Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on TDS Threshold Configuration in SAP S...
entry.content:
Hi @Praveen06 ,

Below is my in-line response.

Ques - Can these thresholds be maintained in the WHT Type/Code configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Answer - Yes, SSCUI-Define Withholding Tax Type for Invoice Posting - choose Accumulation type - 'Per year starting with month 4' for annual thresholds.
SSCUI Define Min/Max Amounts for Withholding Tax Codes- choose A minimum base (threshold) amount with an effective valid-from date
By combining those two conditions, SAP will automatically apply TDS:
If an invoice is greater than 30000 (min threshold) is posted and total paid to that vendor in the financial year exceeds 100000 then TDS will trigger automatically based on configuration

Ques - Is cumulative threshold tracking supported for each vendor annually?

Answer - Yes, per vendor anually.

Ques - Do we need to activate any additional scope items or business configurations?

Answer - Nothing else is required.

Ques - Could you share the list of relevant SSCUIs or apps for maintaining this setup?

Answer - shared above.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: The API interface for cost-based material withdrawal
entry.content:
Hello @xihongshi 

Yes, the API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_MaterialDocumentHeader is valid for cost-based material withdrawals (e.g. movement types 201, 261, etc.).

There’s no difference in the interface structure compared to standard postings — the movement type determines the logic. For cost-based withdrawals, make sure to include required fields like CostCenter (for 201) or OrderID (for 261).

Check this SAP Reference: SAP API Hub – API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: The API interface for cost-based material withdrawal
entry.content:
Hello @xihongshi 

Yes, the API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_MaterialDocumentHeader is valid for cost-based material withdrawals (e.g. movement types 201, 261, etc.).

There’s no difference in the interface structure compared to standard postings — the movement type determines the logic. For cost-based withdrawals, make sure to include required fields like CostCenter (for 201) or OrderID (for 261).

Check this SAP Reference: SAP API Hub – API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV

Thanks and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Application Frontend Service with standalone approuter
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am exploring Application Frontend Service in a BTP trial account and now developing an MTA consisting of a standalone approuter, a UI module, and a CAP backend. Initially, I configured the UI to use the HTML5 Application Repository to ensure it worked properly.

Then, I switched to using Application Frontend Service , referencing to the document.

Although the deployment was successful, accessing the UI through the approuter resulted in a 404 error. The initial xs-app.json of the application router was:

{
  "welcomeFile": "miyasutabooksafs",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "csrfProtection": true
    }
  ]
}

In this configuration, requests to `miyasutabooksafs` were routed to the CAP application. Then, I modified the routes as follows:

{
  "welcomeFile": "miyasutabooksafs",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/odata/(.*)$",
      "target": "/odata/$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "app-front",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

However, this resulted in a deployment error of the approuter.

VError: xs-app.json/routes/1: Format validation failed (A route requires access to app-front service but the service is not bound.)

The application frontend service is bound to the approuter in mta.yaml.

  - name: srv-api
    group: destinations
    properties:
      forwardAuthToken: true
      name: srv-api
      url: ~{srv-url}
  - name: cap-afs-auth
  # - name: cap-afs-html5-runtime
  - name: cap-afs-afs # Application Frontend Service, developer plan

My GitHub repo: https://github.com/miyasuta/cap-afs/tree/appruntime

Question:

What is missing or incorrect in my configuration?
Any insights or working examples would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Issue in MIGO Accounting Entry
entry.content:
Hi @sapcomyogik ,

I am a qualified accountant and i can easily answer your question.

System will generate zero balance clearing lines because the posting is crossing multiple accounting segments, typically profit centers, company codes, functional area or segments. This is unique feature of S4 hana and how ACDOCA is structured. It needs line by line balancing. I guess profit center accounting might be active in your case. Verify if profit center assigned to the stock is different from the one in GR/IR line.

I hope this answer your question.
If you find my response helpful, kindly award a Kudos as small gesture which motivates me to serve you better.
Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer
entry.content: So I am using trail, and I am unable to find the specific IP address, I tried the one for my BAS and even my local IP and updated the connections for instances. But unless, I did allow all IP, I was not able to access, can someone please help me to find the correct way to find the IP needed?

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance: Q2 2025
entry.content:
Welcome to the Q2 2025 release highlights for SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance (IAG), where we unveil the new features designed to enhance security, streamline access governance, and empower your teams. This quarter’s release brings refined role-based risk controls, seamless system integrations, and powerful in-app analysis tools designed to keep your security posture both robust and agile. Whether you’re aiming to automate provisioning tasks or tighten privileged-access reviews, these updates deliver practical improvements you can implement today. Dive into the details below to see how each enhancement makes your day-to-day access governance faster, smarter, and more reliable.

Mitigation Control Assignment to Business Roles

Mitigation controls can now be assigned directly to Business Roles through the Business Role UI or the Mitigation Assignment application, which includes a new Business Roles–specific category. All assignments are recorded in the audit log, and risk assessments for Business Roles inherit any access-level mitigations.

 

Secure Storage of Reports on a Customer-Owned Document Server

Analyze User Access downloads can now be directed straight to your organization’s Document Management Service (DMS). Each report is stored in accordance with your retention and classification policies, removing the need for manual file handling and keeping sensitive data securely within your content repository. Keep an eye on the roadmap as this feature will be extended to include other report types in future releases.

 

Enhanced Access Analysis App

The Access Analysis detail view now includes a built-in smart filter bar for both Access and Risk lists, letting you search, sort, and filter your dataset without ever leaving the interface. This one-pane experience replaces spreadsheet workarounds and speeds up investigations by keeping all controls at your fingertips.

 

Ariba Integration

Additional Ariba user attributes stored in IdDS are automatically provisioned to newly created Ariba accounts. This capability is available in both standalone Cloud Identity Access Governance and SAP Access Control via Bridge integration for IdDS customers. By sourcing attributes directly from the central IdDS, it eliminates manual updates in Ariba and ensures provisioning remains compliant with corporate standards across systems.

 

Updated Rulesets for Concur & BTP Financial Applications

This release adds new segregation-of-duties rulesets for Concur (Expense, Invoice, Request), SAP S/4HANA and SuccessFactors core transactions, and BTP’s advanced financial-closing processes, so you can detect and manage cross-system risks with greater precision and enforce compliance consistently across your finance and HR applications.

Forward Privileged Access Review Requests

The forward functionality in the Privileged Access Monitoring Report enables PAM administrators to efficiently reassign log-review requests to additional reviewers without altering the current workflow stage. This feature enhances resource flexibility by allowing easy redistribution of reviewer responsibilities while maintaining the integrity of existing review processes.

 

Looking Ahead!

With Q2 2025’s release, SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance continues its march toward more intuitive, integrated, and audit-ready access management. These updates deliver targeted improvements that reduce administrative overhead and bolster compliance. Stay tuned for even more innovations next quarter as we refine workflows and expand capabilities based on your feedback.

For more information, to view detailed feature lists, or to get started with SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance, please visit SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance Product Page and Documentation.

We are trying to setup outage calendar in SAP CALM similar to IT calendar work mode setup in Solution manager.
Can you please share the steps to setup the event for planned maintenance of our on-premise S4 systems in SAP Cloud ALM.

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create events in Business Service Management -...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Please refer to the steps provided in https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/business-service-management.
This is the specific page for event creation -> https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/creating-events

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content:
In general, Bart's comments below are correct, the dictionary entries are used at the time of recording.  The only way that I could figure to get around this would be to:

1. Open Producer and select the standard Enable Now recording dictionary as default
2. Translate the content to another language that you do not use, e.g. Italian, using the Automated Translation option
3. Set the custom recording dictionary as default
4. Translate the content back to English or whatever is your source language using the strings in the custom dictionary

That will not work for any modified text strings but it should correct the issue with the action texts that have not been modified following recording.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to programmatically switch detail tabs in MIGO
entry.content:
For leemaz731,

You can use GuiXT as below, to activate the focus to Quantity tab.

Hi, @AyhamT.

Great blog.  I have a question.  How could we get the plugins when we don't have CDS or HANA?  If we cannot get the plugins, are there any alternatives to use UploadSetwithTable?

Noriko

entry.title: Need to know inf how quantities are calculated when creating a Subsequent Debit using an IBD
entry.content:
Hello experts;

I’m SD consultant working with a customer whose operation is small, so I deal with tickets regarding other modules.

I was recently assigned an MM ticket and need your help since the IT coordinator would not take my word when I tell him that what he wants to do might not be possible.

The issue is as follows;

  • Business creates PO for a 300 units of material --> Vendor delivers partial Qty. (100 Units) --> IBD 1 is created and Goods receipt is posted for those 100 units --> Invoice receipt with reference to the IBD 1 is created with MIRO for 100 units --> Subsequent debit with reference to the IBD 1 for Shipping, & handling, Customs clearance and other charges is created for those 100 units
  • A few weeks or months later vendor delivers the remaining 200 units --> IBD 2 is created for those remaining 200 units and Goods receipt (200 units)is posted --> Invoice receipt with reference to the IBD 2 for 200 units is created with MIRO --> Business wants to create Subsequent debit with reference to the IBD but the system defaults the Qty. to 300 units.

My customer wants to know:

  • If we’re using the IBD 2 which is for 200 units as reference, Why does the system default the Qty. to  the cumulative Qty. of the 2 IBDs (300 units)?
  • What is the calculation rule that SAP uses to determine this and where in the customizing can I see this?

Business  knows they can edit that Qty. in MIRO from 300 to 200; however they want to have the 200 units of IBD 2  defaulted; not the cumulative 300 from both IBDs because there are cases where the POs have hundreds of line items and their finance dept. needs to create Invoices and subsequent debits quickly, So thye don't have time to correct the QTY.

I have told them that it’s not likely that they can achieve that since it seems like SAP´s Std. design would not allow it BUT THEY REFUSE TO TAKE MY WORD AND THEY ALSO REFUSE RE-THINK THEIR BUSINESS PROCESS UNTIL I PROVIDE THEM WITH AN OFFICIAL AND EXPLICIT STATEMENT, RESOURCE, NOTE, QUOTE OR WHATEVER FROM SAP THAT PROVES THAT THEY ARE WRONG.

Please let me know if they are asking is possible If not let me know if there's documentation I can use as proof that their requirement is not possible (or absurd)... 

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Q2 2025 Wrap up - SAP Columbus group
entry.content:
In Quarter 2 of the year 2025 we had two meetups. We conducted both a physical gathering and a virtual one. Both were successful. A total of 12 members have joined the Columbus group so far. Many new SAP Community Network logins are being created. Everyone has shown a positive response so far. Here is the wrap-up post of Q2.

In the first physical meetup we had, we discussed the emerging trends in the utility industry and the pharma industry. We discussed the work people were doing in various projects. @manish1910  talked about emerging trends in the pharma industry. In our group, there are a few end users who are eager to transition their careers into core SAP consulting jobs. We got @PawanKhatri , who sponsored the first physical meetup by providing a meeting room and lunch for the members. Overall we got a fantastic start for our Columbus group.

Here is our first meetup photograph:

The second meetup was virtual, where we discussed a specific topic on the SAP S4HANA trial. The request came from @RajeevShah. We discussed details about S4HANA trial access and gave a demo online. @Priyanka_Mishra also joined the virtual meetup and shared her project experience in S4HANA.

We are looking forward to our next meetup soon in July 2025.

Regards,

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Up-level your SAP OData APIs with Azure API Management
entry.content:
Hey @Martin-Pankraz thanks for the post, really well described!
I know it's been a while, however I was wondering if you could please elaborate on thiss

Either have Azure Developer CLI (AZD) trigger the gCTS workflow or receive the trigger from gCTS using AZD hooks.

And specifically on triggering a hook/workflow from gCTS, I was exploring this area for ABAP BTP, but I couldn't find any way to configure/implement triggers/notifications/events on gCTS actions like Pull f.ex.

I couldn't find any way of triggering from gCTS and at the moment I guess the only option to have events is to move to CTM, but I would be happy to know your take on this.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Using RAP action for synchronous commiting processing...
entry.content:
@DEV19 

How about creating a custom (frontend) action that calls an independent REST endpoint on your ABAP server that executes all the required tasks?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/building-a-custom-http-service-using-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-developer/ba-p/13554634

entry.title: Re: Unable to find deposit payment processing capability...
entry.content:
Hi if you referring to public cloud in that case unfortunately this special GL indicator is not available in the configuration as you can see below.

This means you are limited in changing the subledger account for the customer. You can still change the target GL account by creating a new condition type so instead of rent, you can post to bond for example.

entry.title: Re: Has anyone successfully implementing Pay Ranges with...
entry.content: Hi Experts,

entry.title: Re: Has anyone successfully implementing Pay Ranges with...

entry.title: Compensation Salary Structure
entry.content: In SF Compensation, can we configure salary structures using a different field e.g. Function, Department, or Business Unit instead of Legal Entity? Is it possible to segment salary structures based on these categories rather than the default Legal Entity configuration?

entry.title: Career Site Builder on changing hte company name.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’d like to inquire about any potential impact when changing the company name via Career Site Builder > Site Settings. Our current setup reflects "Company A," and we’re planning to update it to "Company B" due to a recent acquisition.

Aside from expected changes to URLs and the need to generate a new SSL certificate for the updated name, are there any other aspects I should be mindful of before proceeding with the change?

Appreciate your insights!

Best regards,
Rev

entry.title: Re: PO sucontracting BoM update with BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Andrea,

are you able to achieve this?

If you can please share the what parameter are you passing in BAPI Table parameter (POCOMPONENTS and POCOMPONENTSX).

PO_ITEM = 0010, SCHED_LINE = 0001 (For Line item 10) ITEM_NO = 0010 (Also tried 0001)
ENTRY_QUANTITY = 10.110
CHANGE_ID = 'U'
REQ_QUAN = 10.110

In POCOMPONENTSX

PO_ITEM = 0010, SCHED_LINE = 0001 (For Line item 10) ITEM_NO = 0010 (Also tried 0001)

PO_ITEMX = 'X'
SCHED_LINEX = 'X'
ITEM_NOX = 'X'
ENTRY_QUANTITY = 'X' 
CHANGE_ID = 'X'         REQ_QUAN = 'X'

But not able to update the quantity field at both entry_quantity & require_quantity.


Appreciate for your help on this. I am passing all required parameters but not able to update the BOM components.

Mahesh

entry.title: Compensation excess budget field
entry.content: Is it possible to configure an additional budget field that allows manual upload of approved excess budget per Legal Entity, Group, or Division, and use it as the basis for budget flagging (e.g., within or exceeding the Performance Bonus budget)? Additionally, can this field be included in the calculation of the Total Budget displayed in the worksheet’s Budget widget?

entry.title: Re: Handling Field Length Differences in SAP Ariba – SAP ERP including S/4 HANA Integration Using CI
entry.content:
Hi  @Francois-Xavier, I understand where you are coming from - but as you are likely aware, the Ariba solution long pre-dates the purchase by SAP. To change the existing code base and data model would negatively impact any existing customers and configurations performed over time to manage field lengths and utilised capability to suit their needs. We've tried to chip away at areas we can change for some time, but a complete rewrite is just not feasible. 

That's not to say that SAP Ariba Procurement will never change! As you are likely aware, SAP Ariba are working away at developing our next generation of solutions - starting with SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition, the newly released SAP Ariba Buying, Procurement Expansion Package and of course, Central Invoice Management. For these solutions, alignment to SAP ERP - specifically S/4HANA Public Cloud (or aka Cloud ERP) - has been the first and foremost consideration. 

This is not the end of the journey. These solutions will evolve into new product offerings and expand to support additional ERPs (SAP and non-SAP), where our baseline is SAP ODM (One Domain Model) based around MDI to leverage master data replication cross solutions. Our future solutions will become more tightly coupled, leveraging centralised supporting services and shared view of master data and transactional data handling. 

For our existing customers, their time will come to be able to leverage these solutions and this shared master and transactional data approach. 

Thanks to @DevPalanimuthu and @jay_rajagopal2 for your work on documenting this topic!

entry.title: Re: Missing selection box column on UI Table ABAP RAP
entry.content: Hi All,

entry.title: Re: Missing selection box column on UI Table ABAP RAP
entry.content: Hi All, I managed to find the answer but i am not sure how to explain.

entry.title: Is It possible to replicate custom MDF from EC to ECP in PTP Employee Data Replication?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to inquire about the possibility to replicate data from custom MDF in EC to Infotype 0057 (Membership Fees) of Malaysia in ECP in PTP Employee Data Replication.

The reason we do not want to use mash-up screen of IT0057 in EC is that the client requirement wants the employee to submit the Membership Fees deduction requests in EC for workflow approval. Once the request is approved, the data is expected to replicate/flow to IT0057 of ECP for payroll processing.

If we build a custom MDF in EC for this scenario, will the PTP Employee Data Replication support the replication of data from the custom MDF in EC to IT0057 in ECP? Or do we need to build custom integration e.g. csv file export from EC and import into ECP? or API integration?

Any advice would be much appreciated. Thanks.

 

Regards,

TP

entry.title: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content:
Hello, experts.

I would like to ask a question about Professional Service Module.
I'm now inspecting SAP S/4HANA Cloud-Public Edition and facing a problem with Project Construction.

In my former project (That was installing project of Private Edition) , we could make multi layer WBS Element in my memory. However, on the Public Edition, there's no settings to implement them into our Test system.

Is it right that we cannot make Project which contains multi layered WBS Element?
I heard we should EPPM to get the function.

Best regards.
Y_T

entry.title: Re: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis...
entry.content:
Hi Farkas Oliver,

I ping you in MS Chat, if still have any questions, we can have a call. 

Best regards,

Tikeer

entry.title: How to restrict the authorization of users to post Supplier Invoices.
entry.content:
How to disable the Post button in supplier invoice apps and restrict certain user from posting a Supplier Invoice?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the authorization of users to post Su...
entry.content:
Hi,

For your question, please refer to the below information for more details. Hope it helps.

1. Execute App Maintain Business Roles, create a custom business role by copying standard role SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT

2. Select these three catalogs and remove them:

  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_MC
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_PC
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_SCHEDULE_PC
  •  

3. Click the Save button.

4. If the user has SAP_BR_RECEIVING_SPECIALIST role assigned, then catalog SAP_LO_BC_LFE_CRT_INTF_PC should also be removed from this role.

5. If the user has SAP_BR_AA_ACCOUNTANT role assigned, then the following two catalogs should also be removed from this role:

  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_DOC_PROC_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_POST_REG_PC

6. Open a parked invoice or create a new one

Now the user has no authorization to post an invoice, only to save and park invoices.

 

Note:

  1. Removing the mentioned Business Roles above will also remove access to those Apps that were possible to Enter with the same roles.
  2. Business Catalog SAP_FIN_BC_AA_POST_REG_PC supports the features of creating Supplier Invoices since CE2502.

 

Thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: How to issue learning after additional Job Location ID's included in the RULES tab
entry.content:
An update was made to Program NAAP_AG_NDIS_ELN_25/26.

Extra sites were added into the Rule.  Since this update, it appears that the learning program is still not being pushed to the required sites (Locations) that were added into the Rule.

Please assist to rectify this.

entry.title: Control by Field Status Variant when executing Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I run Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous), does the control of  Field Status Variant per account work?
I tried it and it didn't work, so I would like to check.

Example:

When Cost Center is hidden, if you try to go to register Cost Center with the API, it will be registered.
Ideally, Cost Center would not be registered, but would be posted without error.

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Email Notification Recipient
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Please help assist to check who are/intended roles of the email notification on the attached, some users are not receiving these email notifications and some also seemed to not consistently receiving these.


The user who consistently receiving these will be retiring, we just need to make sure that we do not PERSON_NAME out these notifications.


Please refer to the attached file "Email Notifications.docx" for sample notifications.


Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Recipient
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Greetings from SAP Support.

For the Cloud System maintenance/outage/downtime Notifications, the subscription is configured in Cloud Systems Notification Subscriptions (Get Notified) application (Please see KBA 2896942 and 2900069)

Your Super/Cloud administrators can manage (delete/edit/modify) Cloud Notification Subscriptions for S-users refer to KBA2896942, please reach to Super/Cloud administrators for checking the recipient of the email notification.

S-user can also subscribe to SAP Customer Data Cloud outage notification emails via SAP for Me at https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/getNotified

You will find further details in KBA3481022 - Different types of notifications - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Hi Venkatesh,We also facing similar issue for ecc to...
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you still seeing the issue? If yes, could you please share more details about the logs? So that we can look into it deeper.
In the meantime, can you please check if below KBA helps?
3098090 - Stuck in phase MAIN_NEWBAS/PARRUN_CONF_REFCHAR during S/4HANA conversion

Best regards,
Charles
